India

Gurugram · March 16–20 · MSCoE
✦ Eight leaders. One week. A blueprint for the future — aligning on strategy, building AI-powered workflows, and deciding what marketing ops looks like in the years ahead.
🗓 Mar 13–21 👥 8 Humans. Infinite AI. 🤖 🏨 Trident Gurgaon ☀️ 28–30°C
Gurugram awaits

Apps to Download
Your India App Kit 📱
🚗
Uber
Reliable cabs for short & long trips. Autos to premium cars. Works great in Gurugram.
🛵
Rapido
Budget rides — bike taxis & autos. Perfect for quick city hops.
💳
Google Pay (GPay)
UPI payments — works everywhere. Restaurants, taxis, shops.
💸
PhonePe
Another go-to UPI app. Super reliable for local payments.
⚡
Zepto
5–10 min delivery. Groceries, snacks, medicines, essentials.
🍔
Swiggy
Food delivery + Instamart for groceries. One app, everything covered.
🎟
District
Book restaurant tables & movie tickets. Great for planning evenings.
👗
Myntra
Shopping — clothes, shoes, accessories. Express delivery on select items.
Pre-Meeting · March 14 & 15
Before the
Work Begins

Two unforgettable days across Delhi and Agra, curated by ICW — India City Walks. All transport fully covered.

🛺
📅 Saturday · March 14
Old Delhi Custom Rickshaw Tour
⏰ 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM · Transport by ICW

Slip into the chaotic, beautiful heart of one of the world's oldest cities. Narrow alleys, ancient mosques, century-old spice traders, and some of the most flavourful street food on earth — all from the seat of a rickshaw.

Your Itinerary
2:00 PM
Pickup from Trident Gurgaon
ICW vehicle arrives at the hotel to collect the group
~2:45 PM
Arrive at Chandni Chowk
Starting point — rickshaws are waiting and ready
3:00 PM
Rickshaw Ride Through Old Delhi
Guided tour through Kinari Bazaar, Jama Masjid area, Fatehpuri Mosque, the legendary spice market
4:30 PM
Street Food Stop 🥘
Jalebi, chaat, kachori, lassi — classic Old Delhi flavours. Dietary needs communicated to ICW in advance.
5:30 PM
Return to Gurgaon
ICW transport back to the hotel
~6:00 PM
Back at Trident ✅
Time to freshen up and enjoy the evening!
Who's coming: ✓ Ashish✓ Gina✓ Jessica✓ Rachel✓ Diane AdrianLizDavid
🕌
📅 Sunday · March 15
Taj Mahal — Full Day Agra
⏰ 6:30 AM – ~7:00 PM · Full day · Transport by ICW

One of the seven wonders of the world. A love story written in white marble. A full day journey to Agra — with a luxury lunch, hands-on craft workshops, and an early morning drive as the mist lifts over the Yamuna.

Your Full Day Itinerary
6:30 AM
Early Departure from Trident
ICW vehicle departs — ~3.5 hour drive to Agra via Yamuna Expressway
~7:30 AM
☕ Starbucks Break
Roadside coffee stop en route — fuel up before the big sight
10:00 AM
🕌 Taj Mahal Visit
Guided tour of the Taj Mahal — history, architecture, and the story of Shah Jahan's love for Mumtaz. Bring your best camera angle.
12:30 PM
🍽 Lunch at Oberoi Amar Vilas
Iconic 5-star restaurant with a direct view of the Taj Mahal — a truly unforgettable setting for a meal
2:00 PM
🔲 Marble Inlay Workshop
Watch Agra's master craftsmen create the same intricate pietra dura inlay work found on the Taj itself
3:00 PM
🧵 Zardozi Embroidery Workshop
Agra's famous gold-thread embroidery — one of India's most ancient craft traditions
4:00 PM
Depart Agra
Head back towards Gurgaon — ~3.5 hour return journey
~5:30 PM
☕ Costa Coffee Break
Rest stop on the return — coffee, snacks, stretch your legs
~7:00 PM
Back at Trident ✅
A day you genuinely won't forget. Rest well — meetings start tomorrow!
Who's coming: ✓ Ashish✓ Gina✓ Jessica✓ Liz✓ Rachel✓ Diane AdrianDavid
🔐
March 20 — The Surprise Activity
Adrian has planned something truly special for our last day together — the kind of day you'll be talking about for years. Every detail has been taken care of. All you need to do is show up.

Trust us. You're going to want to clear your camera roll for this one. 📸
🔓 Unlocked on March 19 evening
